## Workshop Registrations
- Workshop Amsterdam: Thursday, March. 5th 2.30pm-4pm https://forms.office.com/e/7LHPh8kU7Z 
- Workshop Melbourne: Thursday, March. 12th (3pm - 4.30pm) https://engage.sitecore.com/city-tour-australia-sitecoreai-marketplace-code-jam
- Workshop SUGCON London: Thursday, April 16th (8am to 10am) (Registration as add on via the event registration) https://www.eventbrite.co.uk/e/sitecore-user-group-conference-sugcon-europe-2026-tickets-1976708727014?aff=oddtdtcreator 
- Workshop SUGCON India:  Thursday, June 4th (time?) (Registration as add on via the event registration) Link comming soon
